per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you have any medical conditions like high blood pressure or diabetes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: No, I don't have any pre-existing medical conditions like high blood pressure or diabetes. But I do want to mention that my mother has asthma, which might be relevant since I've been experiencing some wheezing and difficulty breathing myself.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: How would you describe your diet and exercise habits?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response:
I'd say my diet is pretty normal - I try to eat healthy most of the time, but with this cough and breathing issue going on, I've been eating a lot more comfort foods like pasta and soup because they're easy to digest. As for exercise, I used to be pretty active, but lately, I've been feeling too tired to do much of anything physical. Even simple tasks like carrying groceries or doing chores have become exhausting for me.

Also, just to add, my mother has asthma, which might be relevant since I've been experiencing some wheezing and difficulty breathing myself.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Has anyone in your family had other serious medical conditions?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My maternal grandmother actually passed away from lung cancer, which might be worth mentioning since I've been experiencing some respiratory issues. But aside from that, I'm not aware of any significant family history of serious medical conditions.
